name: Herb-Rubbed Turkey Breast with Fig & Apricot Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 7 lb Turkey breast, parts of the ribs and wings attached
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Rub the turkey breast inside and out with the salt and pepper, then with the herbs. Discard the herbs or leave some clinging to the breast or tuck them under the skin.
3. Tuck some of the Dried Fig and Apricot Stuffing under the skin and fill the breast cavity.
4. Place the turkey skin side up on a piece of foil (to protect the dressing) in a roasting pan on a rack.
5. Roast for approximately 2 1/2 hours, or about 25 minutes per pound. If using a meat thermometer, insert it into the thickest part of the breast before placing the breast in the oven. The meat is done when the thermometer reads 185 degrees. Let stand at least 10 minutes and up to 30 minutes before carving.
6. Serves 6 to 8.
